title: Australian Apple Crisp
description: A classic dessert featuring tender apples topped with a crunchy oat and brown sugar crisp. Perfect for a chilly evening.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine chopped apples, brown sugar, and flour.
Transfer the apple mixture to a 9x9-inch baking dish.
In another bowl, mix together oats, cold butter, and a pinch of salt until crumbly.
Spread the oat mixture evenly over the apple filling.
If using, sprinkle crumbled bacon over the top.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until the topping is golden brown and the apples are tender.
Serve warm, topped with vanilla ice cream or whipped cream if desired.
Optional: add a sprinkle of cinnamon or nutmeg for extra flavor.
